caption: A man stands on a stage during a presentation, wearing a dark suit jacket over a light-colored shirt and a lanyard. He is positioned to the left of a large projection screen. The screen displays the title "INDUSTRIAL MACHINE LEARNING" and the subtitle "HORIZONTALLY SCALABLE DATA PIPELINES WITH AIRFLOW." Below this, it lists several titles including "CTO Exponential Technologies," "Chairman The Institute for Ethical AI & ML," "Member, Broider AI Expert Group European Commission," and "Advisory group Tech Insta4G," followed by the name "Alejandro Saucedo" and the text "CONTACT ME AT: A@E-X.10." A photo of the man is also displayed on the screen. At the bottom of the overall presentation area, a banner reads "europython" next to a green snake logo and "Edinburgh 23 29 July 2018." Across the frames, the man remains in the same location, gesturing with his hands as he speaks.
